stemHtml: Both an aeroplane (call sign AB139) and a helicopter (call sign AT139) are operating on the same approach frequency. Which of the following actions should the ATC controller take, in order to avoid the potential for call sign confusion?

options.a: Make use of the abbreviated call signs, for the helicopter and the aeroplane.
options.b: Continue using the existing call signs and exercise caution to avoid confusion.
options.c: Instruct both the aeroplane and the helicopter to change their call signs permanently.
options.d: Request a temporary change in one of the two call signs.
